title: does Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype 100 Collection
display_title: does Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype 100 Collection
wikitext:
[]: does Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype 100% Collection.......             Quote Post by movieartman » Sat Dec 27, 2014 10:32 am Does Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype 100% Collection have a good amount of stuff not printed in Der Mond? Or is it mostly all the same stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Dec 27, 2014 11:22 am Der Mond is Sadamoto's art only. Newtype 100% Collection is as the name implies all the art that appeared in monthly Newtype magazines collected into a book and then some other stuff like production lineart thrown in. The overlap is almost non-existent between those two.

[]:             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Sat Dec 27, 2014 11:34 am One of the full color pictures at the beginning of the Newtype 100% Collection also appears in Der Mond , as well as a few pictures from the CD covers page and the Proposal section (the Der Mond versions of the images are larger in size), but that's about it. The vast majority of the book's pictures are different from Der Mond . I write Evangelion book reviews on my blog, so you can read a more thorough description of the Newtype 100% Collection 's contents and see some of the pictures here: Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype 100% Collection There's also a topic on this forum about my Evangelion book reviews, so feel free to ask questions about the books there if you're interested: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/16887/Evangelion-book-review-blog[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Dec 28, 2014 4:08 am If you have to choose one of them, Newtype without a doubt

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Dec 29, 2014 12:58 am As the title implies, Newtype 100% includes artwork that appeared in Newtype magazine, all collected together in an art book. The Eva version was published in 1997 so it has all the Eva Netwype artwork up to that point. The series has obviously received subsequent coverage in the magazine, including cover story status, but I have yet to hear of a 2nd Newtype 100% Collection for Eva. Der Mond was released in 2000. I personally am happy with both. If you are trying to swing one way or the other, another question to ask yourself is do you want all Sadamoto or would you like a variety of artists.
